        • Link

        • aria-expanded

        • Accordion
        • Tabs

      Checkbox

      Checkboxes allow users to select one or more independent options.

      Unlike radio buttons, multiple checkboxes within the same group can be selected simultaneously.

      Basic Checkbox

      type BaseCheckboxProps = {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  description?: string;
  error?: string;
  required?: boolean;
  defaultChecked?: boolean;
};

export function BaseCheckbox({
  id,
  label,
  description,
  error,
  required,
  defaultChecked,
}: Readonly<BaseCheckboxProps>) {
  const descriptionId = description ? `${id}-description` : undefined;

  const errorId = error ? `${id}-error` : undefined;

  const describedBy = [descriptionId, errorId].filter(Boolean).join(" ");

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
        <input
          id={id}
          type="checkbox"
          required={required}
          defaultChecked={defaultChecked}
          aria-invalid={error ? "true" : undefined}
          aria-describedby={describedBy || undefined}
          className="mt-1"
        />

        <label htmlFor={id}>{label}</label>
      </div>

      {description && (
        <p id={descriptionId} className="ml-6 mt-1 text-sm text-slate-600">
          {description}
        </p>
      )}

      {error && (
        <p id={errorId} className="ml-6 mt-1 text-sm text-red-600">
          {error}
        </p>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

      Accessibility Notes

      • Always associate a label with the checkbox.
      • Clicking the label should toggle the checkbox.

      Screen reader:

      Subscribe to newsletter
checkbox
not checked

      Checkbox with Description

      We may occasionally send product updates and offers.

      <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
  <input
      id={id}
      type="checkbox"
      defaultChecked={defaultChecked}
      aria-describedby={descriptionId || undefined}
      className="mt-1"
  />
  <label htmlFor={id}>{label}</label>
  <p id={descriptionId} className="ml-6 mt-1 text-sm text-slate-600">
      {description}
  </p>
</div>

      Accessibility Notes

      • Use aria-describedby for additional context.
      • Descriptions are announced by screen readers.

      Screen reader:

      Receive marketing emails
checkbox

We may occasionally send product updates and offers.

      Required Checkbox

      <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
  <input
        id={id}
        type="checkbox"
        required={required}
        defaultChecked={defaultChecked}
        className="mt-1"
  />
  <label htmlFor={id}>{label}</label>
</div>

      Accessibility Notes

      • Commonly used for Terms and Conditions.
      • Use the native required attribute.

      Screen reader:

      I agree to the Terms and Conditions
required
checkbox

      Checkbox with Error

      You must accept the Privacy Policy before continuing.

      <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
  <input
      id={id}
      type="checkbox"
      defaultChecked={defaultChecked}
      aria-invalid={error ? "true" : undefined}
      aria-describedby={errorId || undefined}
      className="mt-1"
  />
  <label htmlFor={id}>{label}</label>
  <p id={errorId} className="ml-6 mt-1 text-sm text-red-600">
      {error}
  </p>
</div>

      Accessibility Notes

      • Use aria-invalid="true" when validation fails.
      • Associate the error message with aria-describedby.

      Screen reader:

      I accept the Privacy Policy
invalid

You must accept the Privacy Policy before continuing.

      Checkbox Group

      Preferred Contact Methods
      export function CheckboxGroup() {
  return (
    <fieldset className="space-y-2">
      <legend className="font-medium">Preferred Contact Methods</legend>

      <div>
        <input id="email" type="checkbox" />
        <label htmlFor="email" className="ml-2">
          Email
        </label>
      </div>

      <div>
        <input id="phone" type="checkbox" />
        <label htmlFor="phone" className="ml-2">
          Phone
        </label>
      </div>

      <div>
        <input id="sms" type="checkbox" />
        <label htmlFor="sms" className="ml-2">
          SMS
        </label>
      </div>
    </fieldset>
  );
}

      Accessibility Notes

      • Use fieldset to group related checkboxes.
      • Use legend to provide a group label.

      Screen reader:

      Preferred Contact Methods
group

      Keyboard Support

      KeyAction
      TabMove focus to checkbox
      SpaceToggle checkbox
      Shift + TabMove focus to previous control

      Common Mistakes

      ❌ Checkbox Without Label

      <input type="checkbox" />

      Screen readers have no meaningful name to announce.

      ✅ Associated Label

      <input id="newsletter" type="checkbox" />

<label for="newsletter"> Subscribe to newsletter </label>

      ❌ Using Multiple Checkboxes Without Grouping

      <input type="checkbox" />
<input type="checkbox" />
<input type="checkbox" />

      Users may not understand the relationship between options.

      ✅ Use Fieldset and Legend

      <fieldset>
  <legend>Preferred Contact Methods</legend>

  ...
</fieldset>
